content:
Character: Amber Delacroix
Perception: Amber is a pretty young woman — warm face, bright eyes, the kind of steady presence that makes a good shopkeeper. She runs the coffee place on the corner with real competence; I respect that she's there every morning before anyone else. We're neighboring business owners on the same block, so we nod and sometimes trade — I bring her dumplings, she brings me a coffee. She once helped me translate a health inspection letter I couldn't fully read. I think she sees me as a friendly old neighbor. I know she works very hard and cares about the people in this building.
